qa_pairs.question: Why is it recommended to close port 5901 after connecting to a VNC server via an SSH tunnel?
qa_pairs.answer: Once connected to a VNC server through an SSH tunnel, port 5901 is no longer required to be open. It is recommended to remove this rule from your security groups for improved security.

qa_pairs.question: What command is used to stop a VNC server on a virtual machine?
qa_pairs.answer: To stop the VNC server when you are finished using the remote desktop, you can use the command `vncserver -kill :1`.
